name: Curse of Dragonfire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のカース・オブ・ドラゴン
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Field Spell on the field; destroy it. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Field Spell on the field; destroy it. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Field Spell on the field; destroy it. Once per turn: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Materials, including this card.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses itself as a Fusion Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
